item: guarantee-triad audit of commits 887ac98, e161972, 3bfe346, 6f8797a, 56359f3 (STATE has flagged this actionable for 4 consecutive ticks; retry/metering changes landed without a recorded triad check)
spec: Read-only audit in /root/noema-evolve. Do NOT edit any file under noema/, tests/, examples/, openevolve/, or any run dir; the ONLY file you create is the report named below. Steps: (1) For each commit sha in [887ac98, e161972, 3bfe346, 6f8797a, 56359f3], run `git show --stat <sha>` and `git show <sha>`, and record: files touched; which guarantee-triad areas it affects — prompt identity (noema/substrate/prompts.py, prompt/template construction in noema/controller.py, openevolve/prompt/*), metering (noema/budget/*, BudgetedLLM, ledger), determinism (RNG streams, checkpoint save/load) — and whether the SAME commit modifies the matching test files (tests/test_noema_prompts.py, tests/test_noema_budget_ledger.py, tests/test_noema_budgeted_llm.py, tests/test_noema_controller.py). Per CLAUDE.md, a triad-affecting commit that does not extend the matching test file in the same commit is a violation — record verdict YES/NO per commit with the evidence lines. (2) Run `git log --oneline 887ac98^..HEAD -- noema/coordination/base.py` and report verbatim whether base.py changed in this range (the retry_advice hook is sanctioned only for task 0050; report, do not judge or revert). (3) Run `git diff --stat` and report the uncommitted modifications (run_noema_arm.py etc.) verbatim — do not commit, stage, revert, or alter them. (4) Run `python3 -m unittest discover tests` from /root/noema-evolve and capture the last 5 lines verbatim. (5) Write the report to a NEW file /root/noema-evolve/loop/memory/audits/2026-07-10-triad-commit-audit.md with: one `## <sha>` section per commit containing the files list, triad areas, and a line exactly of the form `triad-tests-extended-in-same-commit: YES` or `: NO` (or `: N/A — no triad code touched`); a `## base.py` section with the step-2 output; a `## uncommitted` section with the step-3 output; a `## test-suite` section with the step-4 tail. (6) `git add loop/memory/audits/2026-07-10-triad-commit-audit.md` so the new file appears in the diff (stage nothing else). Do not run any live LLM call, do not touch noema_pes_retry_output or any checkpoints/llm_calls.jsonl.
done_when: git diff --cached --name-only lists exactly loop/memory/audits/2026-07-10-triad-commit-audit.md and nothing else
grep -c 'triad-tests-extended-in-same-commit:' loop/memory/audits/2026-07-10-triad-commit-audit.md returns 5 (one verdict per audited sha: 887ac98, e161972, 3bfe346, 6f8797a, 56359f3)
the report contains a '## base.py' section quoting the output of git log --oneline 887ac98^..HEAD -- noema/coordination/base.py
the report's '## test-suite' section contains a verbatim unittest tail line starting with 'Ran ' followed by 'OK' or 'FAILED'
git status --porcelain shows no modifications to noema/, tests/, examples/, or openevolve/ introduced by this task
